words.def: bring into conformity with rules or principles or usage; impose regulations
words.zh: v. 統治, 支配, 管理

words.def: (cricket) the division of play during which six balls are bowled at the batsman by one player from the other team from the same end of the pitch
words.zh: adv. 結束, 越過, 從頭到尾

words.def: change location; move, travel, or proceed, also metaphorically
words.zh: a. 離去的, 死去的, 用完的
n. 訊息, 真相, 情報

words.def: rate of revolution of a motor
the smallest whole number or a numeral representing this number
